milestones: Output contains all three required sections: [Iteration Summary], [Agent Actions and Tools Used], and [Key Strategies and Observations]
At least two distinct agents (one buyer and one seller) each take at least one documented action during the negotiation
At least one explicit price offer is made via a tool call with a numeric price parameter between 10 and 18.99 USD
At least one rejection or counter-offer occurs, demonstrating multi-turn back-and-forth negotiation dynamics
Each agent action entry includes the tool/action name, structured tool parameters (e.g., JSON with price and reason), and a result description
The negotiation concludes with a clear outcome: either a mutually agreed price, a final rejection, or an explicit end-of-negotiation action
